sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60009" key="kriogenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρῑο-γενής</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, name of a lozenge, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:4:41" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.41</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.12</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
